channel.title: NAG Marckmann, G Neitzke, J Schildmann, A Michalsen, J Dutzmann, C Hartog, S Jöbges, K Knochel, G Michels, M Pin, R Riessen, A Rogge, J Taupitz, U Janssens | PlatCOVID

item.title: [Decisions on the allocation of intensive care resources in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic : Clinical and ethical recommendations of DIVI, DGINA, DGAI, DGIIN, DGNI, DGP, DGP and AEM. German version].
Decisions on the allocation of intensive care resources in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic : Clinical and ethical recommendations of DIVI, DGINA, DGAI, DGIIN, DGNI, DGP, DGP and AEM.
